consistency.class_level_match: Consistent. This is the standard ASI feature granted to many full classes, including the Wizard, at levels 4, 8, 12, 16, and 19.
consistency.mechanics_description: Accurate representation of the standard Ability Score Improvement (ASI) rule, including the cap of 20.

quality.completeness: High. Contains all necessary mechanical elements (when it occurs, what it allows, and the cap).
quality.readability: Excellent. Directly quotes the established rule text.
quality.data_integrity: The slug, name, class, and level structure appear correct for a core class feature.

mechanics.effect: Increase one score by 2 OR two scores by 1.
mechanics.limitation: Cannot increase an ability score above 20.
mechanics.comparison_to_standard: Matches the Player's Handbook (PHB) standard ASI feature for full casters/martial classes.

analysis.suggestions: None. This is a verbatim, high-quality archival of a standard game rule.
